ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used by the athlete */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division in which the athlete competes */,
  "bodyweight_kg" REAL /* Bodyweight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "best_squat_kg" REAL /* Best squat performance in kilograms */,
  "best_bench_kg" REAL /* Best bench press performance in kilograms */,
  "best_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Best deadlift performance in kilograms */,
  "total_kg" REAL /* Total weight lifted in kilograms */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Placement in the event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., SBD for Squat, Bench, Deadlift) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the athlete */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the athlete has been competing */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete's coach */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the powerlifting event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the organizer responsible for the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., national, international) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "weight_class_min_kg" REAL /* Minimum weight class for the division in kilograms */,
  "weight_class_max_kg" REAL /* Maximum weight class for the division in kilograms */,
  "age_range_min" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the division */,
  "age_range_max" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the equipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "squat_kg" REAL /* Squat performance in kilograms */,
  "bench_kg" REAL /* Bench press performance in kilograms */,
  "deadlift_kg" REAL /* Deadlift performance in kilograms */,
  "total_kg" REAL /* Total weight lifted in kilograms */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Placement in the event */,
  "squat_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of squat attempts */,
  "bench_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of bench press attempts */,
  "deadlift_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of deadlift attempts */,
  "squat_best_attempt" REAL /* Best squat attempt */,
  "bench_best_attempt" REAL /* Best bench press attempt */,
  "deadlift_best_attempt" REAL /* Best deadlift attempt */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organizer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizing organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organizer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organizer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organizer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organizer details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee amount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, organizer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
